prompt: Explain the difference between supervised and unsupervised machine learning.
Explain what a linked list is and how it differs from an array.
Explain binary search, how it works, and its time complexity.
Compare Breadth-First Search (BFS) and Depth-First Search (DFS) in graph traversal.
Write a Python function to calculate the N-th Fibonacci number using memoization.
Write a Python function to check if a string is a palindrome.
What is the capital of France and what is its approximate population?
Who proposed the theory of relativity and in what year was it published?
